response.overview: Tiara is a young girl from a village who faces various challenges at a young age. While waiting for her SPM examination results, Tiara discovers that she is pregnant from an incestuous act with Khalid. Fatimah, Tiara's mother, becomes angry when she learns about Tiara's pregnancy and forces her to have an abortion. Wafi, who is Khalid's best friend, has just completed his studies abroad and returns to Malaysia with the intention of marrying his fiancée, Darina. However, Wafi's burning passion after enduring a long-distance relationship is shattered when Darina demands that their engagement be broken off. The conflict escalates when Tiara, desperate to correct her mistake, goes to the capital to find Khalid, who has disappeared. Tiara attempts to track down Khalid in the hope that he can help her resolve the problems that have arisen. Will Tiara be able to find Khalid and free herself from all the troubles that have befallen her?

production_companies.name: Mache All Star United Sdn Bhd

response.title: Tentang Hati Dia
